article: Coco the penguin loves exploring new places. Today, he is going on a [[special|特別的]] adventure to the magic forest.
e: 根據文章內容 'he is going on a special adventure to the magic forest'，正確答案為 B。

article: The golden key was hidden under an old oak tree. Many people tried to find it, but only Coco knew the [[secret|秘密]].
q: What was hidden under the old oak tree?
e: 文章第一句指出 'The golden key was hidden under an old oak tree'，因此隱藏的是金鑰匙。

q: Identify the mistake in the sentence: She [[don't|doesn't]] like playing video games after school.
e: 第三人稱單數主詞 She 的否定句助動詞應該使用 doesn't，使用 don't 是語法錯誤。

q: Identify the mistake in the sentence: Every morning, my father [[is drinking|drinks]] a cup of hot coffee.
e: 當句子開頭有 'Every morning' 表示習慣性的規律動作時，應使用現在簡單式 drinks，而非現在進行式。

q: If it rains tomorrow, we ________ the school picnic.
e: 這是第一類條件句（表示未來的真實情況），結構為 'If + 現在簡單式, 主句 + will + 原型動詞'。

q: Coco is very [[intelligent|聰明的]]; ________, he always gets full marks in English tests.
e: 前後文為因果關係（因為聰明，所以拿滿分），應使用表示「因此」的副詞 therefore。

article: [1] Modern technology makes our lives much easier. [2] For example, smartphones allow us to communicate instantly. [3] However, tigers are endangered animals. [4] We must use devices wisely to avoid wasting time.
q: Which sentence should be removed from the paragraph to keep the focus?
e: 整段文章都在討論現代科技與裝置對生活的影響，第 [3] 句突然提到老虎是瀕危動物，與主題毫無關聯，應予刪除。

article: [1] Learning a new language takes time and patience. [2] You should practice speaking every day. [3] Furthermore, reading simple stories can expand your vocabulary.
q: What is the best way to combine Sentence 2 and Sentence 3 using a transition phrase?
o: Not only should you practice speaking, but you can also read stories
Practice speaking because reading stories is bad
e: 第 2 句和第 3 句是遞進與並列的學習方法，使用 'Not only... but also...' (不僅...而且...) 能最完美、自然地整合這兩個句子。
